chunks.title: The Servant and New Things
chunks.reason: A unified oracle describing the Servant's character and God's declaration of new acts.

chunks.title: Call to Praise and Divine Action
chunks.reason: A call for universal praise followed by God's warrior-like intervention and guidance.

chunks.title: The Paradox of the Blind Servant
chunks.reason: A rhetorical argument contrasting God's servant with the blind nation and explaining their judgment.
